mapper.select:
SELECT p.id AS pipeId, p.name AS pipeName, p.pipe_level AS pipeLevel, p.segment_level AS pipeSegmentLevel, ps.id AS segmentId, ps.name AS segmentName, ps.segment_order AS segmentOrder, ps.start_area_id AS startAreaId, ps.end_area_id AS endAreaId, ps.segment_level AS segmentLevel FROM pipe_segment ps INNER JOIN pipe p ON ps.pipe_id = p.id
ps.segment_level = 'CITY_TO_CITY' AND ( ps.start_area_id = #{areaId} OR ps.end_area_id = #{areaId} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pipe_route_node prn WHERE prn.pipe_id = ps.pipe_id AND prn.area_id = #{areaId} ) )
ps.segment_level IN ('DISTRICT_TO_DISTRICT', 'IN_DISTRICT') AND (ps.start_area_id = #{areaId} OR ps.end_area_id = #{areaId})
1 = 0
ORDER BY p.id, ps.segment_order
